  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy&nbsp;is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a reliable and customer-focused Cashier to manage transactions efficiently and provide excellent service to guests.
	The ideal candidate will handle payments accurately, maintain a positive attitude, and support smooth front-of-house operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet customers warmly and provide a positive first impression
	Process customer orders and handle cash, POS, and digital payments accurately
	Issue receipts, refunds, or change as required
	Maintain an accurate cash register and balance at the end of each shift
	Respond to customer inquiries and resolve basic complaints professionally
	Coordinate with kitchen and service staff to ensure order accuracy
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the cashier/front desk area
	Monitor and restock items like receipts, packaging, and supplies
	Follow company policies on cash handling, hygiene, and safety.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess&nbsp; an OND qualification with 1 - 2 years of working experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;globeeasyhr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Cashier Job at Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy




        
    

        
        Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a reliable and customer-focused Cashier to manage transactions efficiently and provide excellent service to guests.
	The ideal candidate will handle payments accurately, maintain a positive attitude, and support smooth front-of-house operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet customers warmly and provide a positive first impression
	Process customer orders and handle cash, POS, and digital payments accurately
	Issue receipts, refunds, or change as required
	Maintain an accurate cash register and balance at the end of each shift
	Respond to customer inquiries and resolve basic complaints professionally
	Coordinate with kitchen and service staff to ensure order accuracy
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the cashier/front desk area
	Monitor and restock items like receipts, packaging, and supplies
	Follow company policies on cash handling, hygiene, and safety.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess  an OND qualification with 1 - 2 years of working experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Officer",
  "description": "Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy&nbsp;is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Karu, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Logistics Operations Management:


	Coordinate and oversee daily logistics activities including shipments, dispatch, and delivery tracking.
	Ensure timely pickup and delivery of parcels, goods, and cargo.
	Communicate with clients regarding shipment status and delivery timelines.
	Maintain accurate logistics records and delivery documentation.
	Coordinate with drivers, dispatch personnel, and logistics partners to ensure operational efficiency.


Travel Agency Operations:


	Coordinate travel bookings including flight reservations, hotel bookings, and travel itineraries.
	Assist clients with travel documentation requirements.
	Liaise with airlines, travel partners, and visa service providers.
	Ensure accurate processing of travel bookings and confirmations.
	Provide clients with travel updates and respond to travel-related inquiries.


Study Abroad Coordination:


	Assist prospective students with study abroad application processes.
	Coordinate admission applications with partner universities and institutions.
	Guide applicants through documentation requirements such as transcripts, visas, and other necessary paperwork.
	Maintain communication with international institutions and education partners.
	Track student application progress and ensure deadlines are met.


Customer Service and Client Support:


	Serve as a primary point of contact for clients across all business services.
	Address client inquiries, complaints, and service requests promptly.
	Ensure a high level of customer satisfaction and service quality.
	Provide accurate information regarding services offered by the company.


Operational Planning and Coordination:


	Develop and maintain operational schedules for logistics and service delivery.
	Ensure proper coordination between departments to meet service deadlines.
	Monitor operational processes to ensure efficiency and effectiveness.


Reporting and Documentation:


	Maintain accurate operational records across all services.
	Prepare periodic operational reports for management.
	Monitor service performance and identify areas for improvement.


Vendor and Partner Coordination:


	Maintain relationships with logistics vendors, airlines, travel partners, and educational institutions.
	Ensure partners deliver services according to agreed standards.
	Coordinate service agreements and operational arrangements with partners.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;globeeasyhr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Operations Officer Job at Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy




        
    

        
        Global Ease HR Consulting and Academy is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer

Job Location: Karu, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Logistics Operations Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Coordinate and oversee daily logistics activities including shipments, dispatch, and delivery tracking.
	Ensure timely pickup and delivery of parcels, goods, and cargo.
	Communicate with clients regarding shipment status and delivery timelines.
	Maintain accurate logistics records and delivery documentation.
	Coordinate with drivers, dispatch personnel, and logistics partners to ensure operational efficiency.


Travel Agency Operations:


	Coordinate travel bookings including flight reservations, hotel bookings, and travel itineraries.
	Assist clients with travel documentation requirements.
	Liaise with airlines, travel partners, and visa service providers.
	Ensure accurate processing of travel bookings and confirmations.
	Provide clients with travel updates and respond to travel-related inquiries.


Study Abroad Coordination:


	Assist prospective students with study abroad application processes.
	Coordinate admission applications with partner universities and institutions.
	Guide applicants through documentation requirements such as transcripts, visas, and other necessary paperwork.
	Maintain communication with international institutions and education partners.
	Track student application progress and ensure deadlines are met.


Customer Service and Client Support:


	Serve as a primary point of contact for clients across all business services.
	Address client inquiries, complaints, and service requests promptly.
	Ensure a high level of customer satisfaction and service quality.
	Provide accurate information regarding services offered by the company.


Operational Planning and Coordination:


	Develop and maintain operational schedules for logistics and service delivery.
	Ensure proper coordination between departments to meet service deadlines.
	Monitor operational processes to ensure efficiency and effectiveness.


Reporting and Documentation:


	Maintain accurate operational records across all services.
	Prepare periodic operational reports for management.
	Monitor service performance and identify areas for improvement.


Vendor and Partner Coordination:


	Maintain relationships with logistics vendors, airlines, travel partners, and educational institutions.
	Ensure partners deliver services according to agreed standards.
	Coordinate service agreements and operational arrangements with partners.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Brands Optimal Limited is a leading experiential marketing agency. We are one of Africa&rsquo;s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Experiential Marketing

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive Finance Executive to join our finance team.
	This role supports day-to-day accounting tasks, data entry, and reporting in a fast-paced environment, with hands-on learning opportunities for recent graduates pursuing a career in Finance and Accounting.


Core Function


	Provide administrative, clerical, and operational support to the finance team, ensuring efficient record-keeping documentation.


Key Responsibilities


	General Ledger &amp; Bookkeeping: Record daily business transactions into accounting systems Quickbooks.
	Accounts Receivable &amp; Payable: Issue invoices to clients, follow up on outstanding payments, and process vendor payments.
	Bank Reconciliations: Reconcile bank statements daily or monthly to identify and resolve discrepancies in cash flow.
	Tax &amp; Compliance: Ensure timely preparation of schedule for statutory taxes such as VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), and PAYE.
	Audit Support: Prepare detailed schedules and documentation to assist internal and external auditors.
	Carry out clerical tasks required in the finance department and any other tasks assigned by the Head of Department.


Required Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Education: A Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 to 3 years of practical experience in a finance or accounting department.
	Professional Certification: Membership or being at the foundation stage of bodies like ICAN or ACCA is often required for career progression.
	Technical Skills: Working knowledge of Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs) and in specialized accounting software like QuickBooks or Tally.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for career development and training
	A supportive and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to:&nbsp;jobs@brandsoptimal.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Finance Executive Job at Brands Optimal Limited




        
    

        
        Brands Optimal Limited is a leading experiential marketing agency. We are one of Africa’s leading Experiential Marketing Agency which optimizes value for client through the use of strategic, reliable and measurable method in consumer engagement, loyalty seeding and sales generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Experiential Marketing

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive Finance Executive to join our finance team.
	This role supports day-to-day accounting tasks, data entry, and reporting in a fast-paced environment, with hands-on learning opportunities for recent graduates pursuing a career in Finance and Accounting.


Core Function


	Provide administrative, clerical, and operational support to the finance team, ensuring efficient record-keeping documentation.


Key Responsibilities


	General Ledger & Bookkeeping: Record daily business transactions into accounting systems Quickbooks.
	Accounts Receivable & Payable: Issue invoices to clients, follow up on outstanding payments, and process vendor payments.
	Bank Reconciliations: Reconcile bank statements daily or monthly to identify and resolve discrepancies in cash flow.
	Tax & Compliance: Ensure timely preparation of schedule for statutory taxes such as VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), and PAYE.
	Audit Support: Prepare detailed schedules and documentation to assist internal and external auditors.
	Carry out clerical tasks required in the finance department and any other tasks assigned by the Head of Department.


Required Qualifications & Skills


	Education: A Bachelor’s degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 to 3 years of practical experience in a finance or accounting department.
	Professional Certification: Membership or being at the foundation stage of bodies like ICAN or ACCA is often required for career progression.
	Technical Skills: Working knowledge of Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs) and in specialized accounting software like QuickBooks or Tally.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for career development and training
	A supportive and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: That interview is scheduled to hold on Wednesday, 6th of April 2026    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "New Hope Liuhe also known as New Hope Agric and Tech is an agricultural feed manufacturing company, producing chicken feed, pig feed and also fish feed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Logbara, Along Abeokuta express way, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Field procurement officer is responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and purchasing goods required by the company.
	The ideal candidate must be familiar with agricultural markets, possess a solid network of traders, and be capable of sourcing new value-adding raw materials.
	The primary focus of this role is to execute sourcing requests for new raw materials. Responsibilities also include market development, supplier identification, price inquiry, and delivering samples to the factory.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;new_hope5@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Field Procurement Officer Job at New Hope Liuhe




        
    

        
        New Hope Liuhe also known as New Hope Agric and Tech is an agricultural feed manufacturing company, producing chicken feed, pig feed and also fish feed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Procurement Officer

Job Location: Logbara, Along Abeokuta express way, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Field procurement officer is responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and purchasing goods required by the company.
	The ideal candidate must be familiar with agricultural markets, possess a solid network of traders, and be capable of sourcing new value-adding raw materials.
	The primary focus of this role is to execute sourcing requests for new raw materials. Responsibilities also include market development, supplier identification, price inquiry, and delivering samples to the factory.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Manager",
  "description": "Taeillo is an e-commerce furniture and lifestyle brand that manufactures furniture by specializing in African-inspired designs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Job Summary


	The Facility Manager will beresponsible for overseeing the maintenance, safety, and efficiency of the company&rsquo;s manufacturing plant, warehouse, and office facilities. This role ensures that all physical assets, utilities, and support services operate smoothly to support uninterrupted furniture production and distribution.


Job Responsibilities


	Oversee daily operations of the manufacturing facility, including factory floor, warehouses, and office spaces.
	Develop and implement preventive and corrective maintenance schedules for machinery, equipment, and building infrastructure.
	Ensure proper functioning of utilities such as power supply, water systems, HVAC, and waste management.
	Coordinate repairs and maintenance of carpentry machines, upholstery equipment, and finishing tools.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
	Implement workplace safety policies and conduct regular safety inspections.
	Monitor fire safety systems, emergency preparedness, and evacuation procedures.
	Investigate incidents and recommend corrective actions.
	Source, negotiate, and manage service providers (cleaning, security, maintenance, waste disposal, etc.).
	Optimize space utilization for production, storage, and office operations.
	Maintain records of company assets including machinery, tools, and facility equipment.
	Monitor energy consumption and implement cost-saving initiatives.
	Prepare and manage facility budgets, including maintenance and operational costs.
	Oversee facility security systems, access control, and surveillance.
	Ensure safeguarding of raw materials, finished goods, and equipment.
	Conduct risk assessments and implement mitigation strategies.
	Implement waste reduction and recycling initiatives (wood, foam, fabric, etc.).
	Ensure proper disposal of industrial waste and compliance with environmental standards


Qualification/Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or a related field.
	5+ years of experience in facility management, preferably in manufacturing or industrial environments.
	Experience in furniture production or related industries is an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of building systems, maintenance, and industrial manufacturing equipment.
	Good understanding of health and safety regulations.
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure in a production-driven environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;peopleandculture@taeillo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	The Facility Manager will beresponsible for overseeing the maintenance, safety, and efficiency of the company’s manufacturing plant, warehouse, and office facilities. This role ensures that all physical assets, utilities, and support services operate smoothly to support uninterrupted furniture production and distribution.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee daily operations of the manufacturing facility, including factory floor, warehouses, and office spaces.
	Develop and implement preventive and corrective maintenance schedules for machinery, equipment, and building infrastructure.
	Ensure proper functioning of utilities such as power supply, water systems, HVAC, and waste management.
	Coordinate repairs and maintenance of carpentry machines, upholstery equipment, and finishing tools.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
	Implement workplace safety policies and conduct regular safety inspections.
	Monitor fire safety systems, emergency preparedness, and evacuation procedures.
	Investigate incidents and recommend corrective actions.
	Source, negotiate, and manage service providers (cleaning, security, maintenance, waste disposal, etc.).
	Optimize space utilization for production, storage, and office operations.
	Maintain records of company assets including machinery, tools, and facility equipment.
	Monitor energy consumption and implement cost-saving initiatives.
	Prepare and manage facility budgets, including maintenance and operational costs.
	Oversee facility security systems, access control, and surveillance.
	Ensure safeguarding of raw materials, finished goods, and equipment.
	Conduct risk assessments and implement mitigation strategies.
	Implement waste reduction and recycling initiatives (wood, foam, fabric, etc.).
	Ensure proper disposal of industrial waste and compliance with environmental standards


Qualification/Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or a related field.
	5+ years of experience in facility management, preferably in manufacturing or industrial environments.
	Experience in furniture production or related industries is an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of building systems, maintenance, and industrial manufacturing equipment.
	Good understanding of health and safety regulations.
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure in a production-driven environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
